message:
feat(ui): add resizable split view panes

In split view, the list pane can now be resized using < and > keys:
- < shrinks the list pane (moves divider left)
- > expands the list pane (moves divider right)
- Range limited to 20%-80% of available width
- Default remains 40% for list pane

Help text updated to document the new keybindings.

Closes #89

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -232,6 +232,8 @@ const contextHelpSplit = `## Split View
 
 **Focus**
   Tab       Switch panes
+  <         Shrink list pane
+  >         Expand list pane
 
 **Left Pane (List)**
   j/k       Navigate issues
